sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 109:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 109:1
items.html: From the perspective of the light, which is the primary, the Sefira Tifferet is the primary part of ZA, since the light of Tifferet is the self of the light Hesed in the vessel of Bina. For this reason‎, it is called Vav with a Rosh [ו], as phases GAR of Bina rest on it from the time it was in the vessel of Bina. However, from the perspective of the vessel, it is the Sefira Netzah, which is the fourth edge in the five edges, opposite the fourth phase in the five phases KHB, ZA, and Malchut. You find that ZA in the five phases is opposite Netzah in the five Hassadim. (There)
